_export.subject: Able.cz s.r.o.
_export.note: ASSESSED epistemic projection. Derived from the dossier's sourced records; every row lists the record IDs it is computed from. Ordinal scales only; nothing invented.

gaps.expectedDatum: Filed financial statements (revenue, result, assets, headcount) — available at justice.cz Sbírka listin, not retrieved in this pass.
Whether the marketing roles CTO (Grolig) and CSO (Juhaňák) correspond to any current statutory function.
Independent client confirmation of the quantified case-study results (ROI, person-days).
gaps.recommendedSource: nezávislé potvrzení od klientů (mimo web Able)

gaps.expectedDatum: Public-sector contracts and any EU-cofinanced project details (Hlídač státu and grant registers not retrieved here).
gaps.recommendedSource: Hlídač státu / registr smluv / dotační registry

gaps.expectedDatum: Combined Able+Blackfish headcount as filed (each entity files separately; Able's own filed revenue for FY2024 is now known — see financials).
The exact stake split and jednatel dates for one label s.r.o.'s three co-owners (Juhaňák, Jakub Kaman, Ondřej Kaman) — see CON-02 — need a direct or.justice.cz lookup to resolve.
gaps.recommendedSource: or.justice.cz — přímý výpis IČO 02474727 (one label s.r.o.)

gaps.expectedDatum: Whether Vít Schlesinger's concurrent stake in Ventoux Studio s.r.o. (undisclosed in Able/Blackfish media coverage) has any operational bearing on Able.cz.
Why Lukáš Oslzla departed Blackfish & Co. in February 2024, 17 months before the Able.cz acquisition — no public source addresses this.
gaps.recommendedSource: média / veřejné prohlášení k odchodu L. Oslzly z Blackfish

gaps.expectedDatum: Whether Petr Faraga is related to Václav Faraga — plausible from the age gap and shared address cluster, but not stated anywhere.
gaps.recommendedSource: veřejný zdroj k rodinnému vztahu P. a V. Faragy (nenalezen)

gaps.expectedDatum: All facts sourced to SRC-10/SRC-11 (kurzy.cz, Hlídač státu) are CORROBORATED via aggregator mirrors, not VERIFIED_PRIMARY via a direct or.justice.cz fetch — the firm/person *search* UI is JS-rendered and blocked automated fetch, though the Sbírka listin document index and downloads (SRC-15/16/17) did work directly and reach VERIFIED_PRIMARY.
gaps.recommendedSource: přímý or.justice.cz fetch (nahradit aggregator mirrors SRC-10/11)

gaps.expectedDatum: Employee count (filed — not a line item in this rozvaha/výkaz filing)
Consolidated Able+Blackfish combined financials (each entity files separately)
